# protonpass_item_note (Resource)

Manages a Proton Pass note item.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "protonpass_item_note" "example" {
  share_id        = protonpass_vault.example.share_id
  title           = "My Note"
  note_wo         = "content"
  note_wo_version = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `share_id` (String) Share ID of the vault.
- `title` (String) Title of the note.

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `note_wo` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Note content (write-only, never stored in state).
- `note_wo_version` (Number) Increment to trigger note content update.

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (String)
- `item_id` (String) Unique identifier of the item.
- `modify_time` (String)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Note items can be imported by specifying the share ID and item ID separated by a colon
terraform import protonpass_item_note.example "share_id:item_id"
```
